{{Quote|All ''right'', persistent! To ''survive'' I've gotta deal grief to ''someone''... might as well start with ''you''!|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 22">[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]]</ref>}}
'''Persistent''' was the nickname [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] gave to one of his opponents in [[The Big Game]]. Persistent was a red-skinned humanoid who persistently tried to shoot [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Although Han's [[needle ray]] had been disabled, Han managed to use a [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shield]] to deflect an opponent's blast into Persistent's chest.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 22}} {{1st}}
